title: 2pcs Suction Hooks,Heavy Duty Plastic Strong Vacuum Suction Cup,Clear Reusable Suction Hooks for Bathroom,Multi-Purpose Vacuum Seamless Sucker Hook for Kitchen,Bathroom,Door,Window,Xmas Wreath
features: Packaging quantity: You will receive 2 vacuum suction cups.The diameter of bathroom hooks is 7cm that have compact shape, can decoration your home and save more space.
Strong and Durable: Our bathroom suction hooks are made of user-friendly silica gel and clear durable plastic. Different from other products, our shower hooks can hold a maximum load of 3 kilograms.

Easy to Install & Reusable: 1.Clean and dry the installation area; 2.Peel off the protective film on the hook; 3.press firmly on the top to squeeze the air then lock the hook. 4.Reuse: Wash it with warm water before re-install. 5.No drilling, no screws, no tools.（Please Note: Don't stick to painted walls, wood, concrete & other uneven surfaces）

Removable & Reusable:Lift the hook or use a flat blade to release the suction cup without any trace left like sticky residue or stains. You can reuse it and stick the removable suction hanger where you want.The hook is transparent and Suitable about wreath hook well as a wreath hanger for front door

Suitable Surface:The suction hooks can be used on surface: Metal, Glass, Tile, Mirror, Stainless Steel and Laminated Board so on. The hooks are not used on the rough surface: painted wall, rough surface, wallpaper wall, limed wall, concrete wall. it can meet your different needs that very convenient to organize bathroom, kitchen, bedroom, office, school, hotel or store.
